## Procedures.ProceduresLibrary class

Multi-source procedure library with type-safe access

Wraps AggregatedResultMap to provide: - Composite ID access (e.g., "common.ganache-cold-method") - Multi-source management (built-in, user, app-local, etc.) - Mutable vs immutable collection distinction - Weakly-typed validating access for external data

**Signature:**

```typescript
export declare class ProceduresLibrary extends SubLibraryBase<ProcedureId, BaseProcedureId, Procedure> 
```
**Extends:** [SubLibraryBase](./ts-chocolate.librarydata.sublibrarybase.md)<!-- -->&lt;[ProcedureId](./ts-chocolate.procedureid.md)<!-- -->, [BaseProcedureId](./ts-chocolate.baseprocedureid.md)<!-- -->, [Procedure](./ts-chocolate.procedures.procedure.md)<!-- -->&gt;
